content: Phase 1 POC: Research best practices (ledger, auth, storage, PDF)
Phase 1 POC: Implement double-entry ledger engine with invariants
Phase 1 POC: Implement idempotency store and middleware
Phase 1 POC: Implement S3 adapter interface with LocalS3 fallback
Phase 1 POC: Implement JWT and TOTP auth primitives
Phase 1 POC: Create comprehensive test script (test_core_atlas.py)
Phase 1 POC: Run tests and fix until all pass
Phase 1 POC: All user stories validated and working
Phase 2: Get design guidelines from design_agent
Phase 2: Backend implementation (auth, KYC, ledger, admin)
Phase 2: Seed script with demo data
Phase 2: End-to-end testing via testing agent
Phase 2: All user stories covered in development and testing
